nodes.title: Samplers
widgets_values:
You can set for every video part a separate positive prompt on the samplers.
⬇️

nodes.title: Positive prompts
widgets_values:
Set your positive prompts for every stage here
➡️

nodes.title: Intermediate Videos
widgets_values:
This are the videos for every stage for reference and as OOM backup.
➡️

nodes.title: Basic usage
widgets_values:
## Usage

| Usage | (Number key) Shortcuts |
|---|---|
| 1. Set Checkpoints, Clip + VAE | (3) Checkpoint (subgraph) |
| 2. (optional) add LoRAs | (1) Settings, Prompt, Image, Video |
| 3. Enable Featuras you want with the "Features - Switch" | (1) Settings, Prompt, Image, Video |
| 4. Tune any parameter to your liking under "BASIC SETTINGS" | |
| 5. Add image you need | |
| 6. Write your prompts | (4) Samplers |
| 7. Enable as many samplers as you want the video going | |
| 8. Generate | |
|Optional: Tune any internal setting | (2) Backend (subgraph) |

nodes.title: BASIC settings
widgets_values:
| Setting | Default / Example | Description | |--------:|------------------:|------------:| | **Seconds** | 5 | Set the desired length of the video in seconds. | | **CRF** | 20, webm, VP9 | Video compression level. Visually lossless. Set on VHS Node.| | **FPS** | 24 | Frames per second for videos. SVI works well with 24. | | **Shift** | 8 | Default 8. Adjust and test; WAN 2.2 SVI valid in range 8-12. | | **Steps total** | 6 | Total steps - node handles step math. More steps → higher quality but longer generation. Use even numbers. | | **Step Refiner** | 3 | Default 2 (50% of 4). Change to test different swap behavior. | | **Sampler** | euler | "Euler" works everytime. Other samplers can enhance detail or motion. This has major impact on how the video is generated. | | **Scheduler** | simple | "Simple" works eveytime. Other like "beta" and others can enhance some samplers. | | **Seed** | number + fixed | Every stage has a fixed seed. Set a specific seed to reproduce the same outcome. | | **Sage Attention** | disabled | Can be enabled **if installed correctly** to speed-up video generation times. | | **Watermark upload** | none | Here you can upload a watermark image and calibrate the settings to your liking (subgraph). | | **Positive prompt** | none | Write your positive prompt!
1) Brief description of the setting/appearance
2) Actions, motions, story
3) Camera composition
CFG 1 normally disables/ignores the negative prompt! NAG effectively enables negative prompting on CFG 1.| | **Negative prompt** | none | Write what you would like to exclude. Works only if CFG > 1 or NAG is enabled | | **Checkpoints** | Safetensors/GGUf |Choose the type of Checkpoint to use. Wan 2.2 uses a different diffusion model for the first steps (high noise) vs the last steps (low noise). You can ether use safetensors or gguf.| | **CLIP** | standard encoder | Use your preferred standard CLIP text encoder. No CLIP Vision H — not trained/implemented in WAN 2.2 and weights are disabled. | | **VAE** | same as WAN 2.1 | Still using the same VAE as WAN 2.1. |

nodes.title: Video codec, CRF, compression and quality
widgets_values:
| Codec | CRF | Visual impact | Compatibility | Quality and compression |
|----------|-----|-------|-----|-----|
| AV1 | 30 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| h265 | 19 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| VP9 | 20 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| h264 | 19 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐ |


💡 *Tip* For AI-generated videos:
* AV1 (webm) or VP9 (webm) for websites
* AV1 (webm) or h265 (mp4) for local store

nodes.title: Resolution note
widgets_values:
### Automatic scaling and resolution calculation The initial image will be scaled on optimized math targeting a WAN 2.2 VAE (div16) resolution. Aspect will be calculated automatically and the video resolution will be set to the nearest possible match with the megapixel count. | Stage | Target MP | Quality | Use case | |---:|---:|---:|---| | 1 | 0.25 | Preview
~ 360p| Motion/physics tests. | | 2 | 0.33 | Fast
~ 432p| Simple quality. | | 3 | 0.40 | SD Speed
~ 480p| ⚠️ Official SVI resolution | | 4 | 0.60 | SD
~ 576p| Optimal for mobile-first content. | | 5 | 0.72 | Balanced HD
~ 640p| Consistent, good details. | | 6 | 0.85 | HD
~ 720p| Very stable, crisp details. | | 7 | 1.05 | THD
~ 768p| Maximum stability for Image-to-Video. | | 8 | 1.15 | THD+
~ 800p| 16GB VRAM "sweet spot". | | 9 | 1.30 | HQ
~ 900p| High detail, very slow (Requires high VRAM). | | 10 | 2.07 | FHD
~ 1080p| Production grade detail, extreme slow (Requires very high VRAM). |

nodes.title: 💡 SVI usage / hints
widgets_values:
* Use with 24 fps
* Use official resolution 
* It is trained on exact 81 frames, long frame-counts will color shift
* Use different seeds for every video-segment
🎦 Here will be your final video result.
🎦 Here will be your intermediate video result before upscaling or any other output feature.

widgets_values: Set your low LoRAs for every stage here ➡️

nodes.title: High LoRA
widgets_values: Set your high LoRAs for every stage here ➡️
✅ Here you set your initial image (frame) of your video.

## Model links

**text_encoders**

- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

**model**

- [DaSiWa WAN 2.2 i2v 14B (S) Lightspeed](https://civitai.com/models/1981116)
   
  OR other models (like GGUF) from my collection
- [DaSiWa Collection](https://civitai.com/collections/13277112)

**vae**

- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/blob/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)

**SVI 2.0 Pro LoRAs**

- [SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_HIGH_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0/SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_HIGH_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors)

- [SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_LOW_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0/SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_LOW_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors)

## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │      └── *.safetensors / *.gguf
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Samplers
widgets_values: ⬆️ Activate as many samplers as you like. Every sampler will expand the video with one full frame-count.

nodes.title: Model select
widgets_values:
⬆️ Checkpoints, CLIP+VAE here
Select type at "Checkpoint Switch" SVI 2.0 LoRA is mandatory.

nodes.title: Resolution
widgets_values:
⬆️ this will set the megapixel resolution of your video.
The logic scales the initial image to that MP and renders the video with that resolution.

nodes.title: Post-processing
widgets_values:
| Feature | Default / Example | Description |
|--------:|------------------:|------------:|
| Color match | off | This will try to match the color from the initial image to the samples. The color match algorithms default is set by default to '0.75'. Feel free to test other strength. |
| Interpolation | off | This will interpolate your video to double fps at the end. Interpolated FPS = 2 × FPS. |
| Upscale 2x (fast) | off | Final resolution = 2 × start resolution while maintaining aspect ratio. No morph; color-correct fast lanczos upscale. Low VRAM consumption. |
| Upscale /w Model (slow) | off | Final resolution depends on the used upscaler model; Can change/enhance details and high VRAM consumption. |
| RTX Super Resolution | off | 2x ultra fast accurate upscaling. RTX cards only. |
| Watermark | off | Enable for a watermark overlay on video. |

nodes.title: Changelog
widgets_values:
## Requirements - [ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) - [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) - [Comfyui-WhiteRabbit](https://github.com/Artificial-Sweetener/comfyui-WhiteRabbit)
+ *packaging, torchlanc* - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) - [ComfyUI-Easy-Use](https://github.com/yolain/ComfyUI-Easy-Use) - [ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation](https://github.com/Fannovel16/ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation) - [ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts](https://github.com/pythongosssss/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts) - [ComfyUI-GGUF](https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF) - [ffmpeg](https://www.ffmpeg.org/) - [Sage Attention](https://github.com/thu-ml/SageAttention) (optional) - [Upscaler model](https://openmodeldb.info/) (optional) --- ## Features - 🖼️ **SVI** (SVI 2.0 up to 10 samplers) - 🧩 **Automatic aspect‑ratio calculation and fitting** - ✨ **Ultra‑fast, color‑correct upscaling** (torchlanc) OR **Upscale with Model** - 🤝 **Video resolution matching** - Fully automatic scaling and resolution calculations - 🕠 **Length automation** - Fully automatic calculation of frame count - 🫥 **Watermark** support - 🪄 **Interpolation** feature - 🔖 **Bookmark-Shortcuts** - with number keys --- ## Changes / Fixes - Added RTX 2x SuperResolution upscaler - Rebuild ComfyUI 0.17x/0.18.x compatible - Wire optimizations

nodes.title: Resolution and frame count (automated)
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1.

Frame count must be 81 for SVI 2.0  (official statement). So it is fixed.

FPS should be 24 (official statement).
